title: Problem Solving: Model Addition and Subtraction
essential_question: How can you use the strategy draw a diagram to solve addition and subtraction problems?

pretest.question: Elena bowled 127 in game 1. She scored 16 more in game 2. What was her total score?
pretest.hint: First find game 2 score, then add both games.

expected_errors.description: Game 2 점수(143)에서 멈춤 — 두 경기 합계를 구해야 하는데 부분 결과를 최종 답으로 제출
expected_errors.citation: Carpenter et al. (1999) p.13 — 'The most frequent error in two-step word problems is stopping at an intermediate result; this pattern affects 40–60% of Grade 3 students.'

pretest.math_note: 2단계 덧셈: ①2경기 점수 계산(127+16=143), ②합계 계산(127+143=270). 중간 결과(143)가 최종 답이 아님.

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 12
concept_source.description: Problem Solving: Model Addition and Subtraction — bar model 전략으로 2단계 문장제 풀기

procedure_source.description: 2단계 덧셈·뺄셈 문장제: 막대 모델 그리기 → 식 세우기 → 검산

assessment_source.description: 3.OA.D.8 평가 지침 — 2단계 문장제 풀이 및 식 표현 능력 검증 기준

pretest.question: Mike's Music sold 287 CDs on day 1. Day 2 sold 96 MORE than day 1. How many CDs total?

expected_errors.description: 2일차 CD 수(383)에서 멈춤 — 양일 합계(670)를 구해야 하는 2단계 문제
expected_errors.citation: Carpenter et al. (1999) p.13 — 'The most frequent error in two-step word problems is stopping at an intermediate result; this pattern affects 40–60% of Grade 3 students.'

pretest.math_note: 2단계 덧셈: ①2일차 CD 수(287+96=383), ②합계(287+383=670). '96 more than'은 기준량에 추가하는 비교 덧셈.

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 12
concept_source.description: Problem Solving: Model Addition and Subtraction — bar model 전략으로 2단계 문장제 풀기

procedure_source.name: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 2 Lesson 6
procedure_source.description: 2단계 덧셈·뺄셈 문장제: 막대 모델 그리기 → 식 세우기 → 검산

assessment_source.name: NCTM OA Progressions Grade 3 p.9
assessment_source.description: 3.OA.D.8 평가 지침 — 2단계 문장제 풀이 및 식 표현 능력 검증 기준

pretest.question: A store had 543 books. Sold 287 on Monday. Received 125 new books Tuesday. How many now?
pretest.hint: Subtract what was sold, then add what arrived.

expected_errors.description: 월요일 이후 권수(256)에서 멈춤 — 화요일 입고 후 최종 재고(381)를 구해야 함
expected_errors.citation: Carpenter et al. (1999) p.13 — 'The most frequent error in two-step word problems is stopping at an intermediate result; this pattern affects 40–60% of Grade 3 students.'

pretest.math_note: 덧셈·뺄셈 혼합: ①월요일 이후(543−287=256), ②화요일 이후(256+125=381). 두 연산을 순서대로 적용.

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 12
concept_source.description: Problem Solving: Model Addition and Subtraction — bar model 전략으로 2단계 문장제 풀기

procedure_source.name: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 2 Lesson 6
procedure_source.description: 2단계 덧셈·뺄셈 문장제: 막대 모델 그리기 → 식 세우기 → 검산

assessment_source.name: NCTM OA Progressions Grade 3 p.9
assessment_source.description: 3.OA.D.8 평가 지침 — 2단계 문장제 풀이 및 식 표현 능력 검증 기준

pretest.question: Which bar model shows '348 + 156 = ?'?
choices: A. One bar labeled ? with two parts: 348 and 156
B. One bar labeled 348 with a part labeled 156 and part labeled ?
D. One bar labeled 348+156 with no parts
solution_steps: We're adding 348 and 156 to find total
Bar model: total (?) on top, two parts below
pretest.hint: Addition = total unknown. Parts are the two addends.

expected_errors.description: B 선택 — 전체를 알고 부분을 찾는 뺄셈 모델로 혼동. 348+156=?는 부분→전체 덧셈 모델(A)이 정답
expected_errors.citation: EngageNY G3 Module 2 Lesson 5 Teacher Edition — 'Students conflate the addition and subtraction bar model structures.'

pretest.math_note: 막대 모델 선택: 덧셈(부분 합산→전체) 모델은 부분이 아래, 전체(?)가 위. 348+156=? → 정답 A.

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 12
concept_source.description: Problem Solving: Model Addition and Subtraction — bar model 전략으로 2단계 문장제 풀기

assessment_source.description: 3.OA.D.8 평가 지침 — 2단계 문장제 풀이 및 식 표현 능력 검증 기준

pretest.question: Tara has 450 stickers. She gives 178 to her friend and 135 to her sister. How many does she have left?
pretest.hint: First find total given away, then subtract from 450.

expected_errors.description: 언니에게만 뺌(450−178=272) — 동생에게 준 135도 빼야 하는 2번째 뺄셈 성분 누락
expected_errors.citation: Carpenter et al. (1999) p.15 — 'Students undercount components when two or more groups are removed or added simultaneously.'

pretest.math_note: 2단계 뺄셈: ①두 명에게 준 스티커(178+135=313), ②남은 스티커(450−313=137). 두 번 빼야 함.

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 12

learn.title: What Is a Bar Model?
learn.content: A bar model is a drawing that helps you see the parts of a problem. It looks like a rectangle split into sections. The WHOLE bar is the total. The sections are the parts.
learn.math_note: 막대 모델은 전체와 부분의 관계를 시각화. 이 단계에서는 실제 사물(블록, 카운터)로 전체-부분 구조를 먼저 탐구.

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 12

assessment_source.description: 3.OA.D.8 평가 지침 — 2단계 문장제 풀이 및 식 표현 능력 검증 기준

learn.title: Bar Model for Addition
learn.content: When you ADD, you know the parts and need the total. Draw a bar split into parts. Write the known numbers in the parts. The total (?) goes on top. Example: 287 + 383 = ? → bar with parts 287 and 383, total ? on top.
learn.math_note: 덧셈 막대 모델: 부분1 + 부분2 = 전체(위). ?가 전체 위치에 있으면 덧셈 문제.

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 12
concept_source.description: Problem Solving: Model Addition and Subtraction — bar model 전략으로 2단계 문장제 풀기

procedure_source.name: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 2 Lesson 6
procedure_source.description: 2단계 덧셈·뺄셈 문장제: 막대 모델 그리기 → 식 세우기 → 검산

assessment_source.name: NCTM OA Progressions Grade 3 p.9
assessment_source.description: 3.OA.D.8 평가 지침 — 2단계 문장제 풀이 및 식 표현 능력 검증 기준

learn.title: Bar Model for Subtraction
learn.content: When you SUBTRACT, you know the total and one part. You need the other part. Draw a bar with the total on top. One part is known, the other is ?. Example: 543 − 287 = ? → total 543, one part 287, missing part ?.
learn.math_note: 뺄셈 막대 모델: 전체(위) − 알려진 부분 = ?. ?가 부분 위치에 있으면 뺄셈 문제.

assessment_source.description: 3.OA.D.8 평가 지침 — 2단계 문장제 풀이 및 식 표현 능력 검증 기준

learn.title: Two-Step Problems
learn.content: Some problems need TWO calculations. Read carefully! Example: Elena scored 127 in game 1 and 16 MORE in game 2. Total? Step 1: Game 2 = 127+16 = 143. Step 2: Total = 127+143 = 270.
learn.math_note: 2단계 문제: 1단계 결과를 중간 값으로 사용해 2단계 계산. 각 단계를 별도 막대 모델로 표현 가능.

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 12

procedure_source.description: 2단계 덧셈·뺄셈 문장제: 막대 모델 그리기 → 식 세우기 → 검산

assessment_source.name: NCTM OA Progressions Grade 3 p.9
assessment_source.description: 3.OA.D.8 평가 지침 — 2단계 문장제 풀이 및 식 표현 능력 검증 기준

learn.title: Key Words to Watch For
learn.content: 'More than' often means add first, then maybe add again. 'In all' or 'total' means add. 'How many left' or 'how many more' means subtract. 'Then' or 'after' often signals a second step.
learn.math_note: 핵심 어휘: 'more than'→덧셈으로 기준량 먼저 계산, 'in all/total'→덧셈, 'left/more'→뺄셈, 'then/after'→2단계 신호.

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 12

learn.title: Example: Mike's Music
learn.content: Day 1: 287 CDs. Day 2: 96 MORE than day 1. Total? Bar model: Total = Day1 + Day2. Day 2 = Day1 + 96 = 287+96 = 383. Total = 287+383 = 670.
learn.math_note: Mike's Music 예시: Day2=Day1+96=287+96=383, Total=287+383=670. 2단계 막대 모델 완전 예시.

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 12
concept_source.description: Problem Solving: Model Addition and Subtraction — bar model 전략으로 2단계 문장제 풀기

procedure_source.description: 2단계 덧셈·뺄셈 문장제: 막대 모델 그리기 → 식 세우기 → 검산

assessment_source.name: NCTM OA Progressions Grade 3 p.9
assessment_source.description: 3.OA.D.8 평가 지침 — 2단계 문장제 풀이 및 식 표현 능력 검증 기준

learn.title: Check: Does My Answer Make Sense?
learn.content: After solving, ask: Is my answer reasonable? Estimate first! 287+383 → about 300+400=700. Answer 670 is close to 700. Makes sense!
learn.math_note: 검산 전략: 추정값과 비교(300+400≈700, 실제 670). 합리적 범위 내 → 정답 가능성 높음. 답+뺀 수=원래 수로 역검산.

learn.math_talk_prompt: Mike's Music 문제를 풀었습니다: Day1=287, Day2=383, Total=670. 검산해봅시다: 670에서 383을 빼면? 670−383=287 ✓ Day1과 같네요. 지금 풀고 있는 문제에서도 이렇게 역방향으로 확인할 수 있을까요? 왜 이 확인 방법이 항상 통하는 걸까요?

learn.title: Drawing Your Own Bar Model
learn.content: Step 1: Read the problem. Step 2: Ask 'What do I need to find?' Step 3: Draw a bar. Label the known parts. Put ? for the unknown. Step 4: Decide: add or subtract? Step 5: Solve and check.
learn.math_note: 5단계 요약: 읽기 → 무엇을 찾나 → 막대 그리기 → 연산 결정 → 계산·검산. 이 순서를 습관화.

try.question: A baker made 245 muffins Monday and 178 Tuesday. He sold 89 muffins Wednesday. How many muffins are left?
try.hint: Step 1: Add to find total. Step 2: Subtract what was sold.

expected_errors.description: 총 머핀(423)에서 멈춤 — 판매 후 남은 머핀(334)을 구하는 2단계를 실행하지 않음
expected_errors.citation: Carpenter et al. (1999) p.13 — 'The most frequent error in two-step word problems is stopping at an intermediate result; this pattern affects 40–60% of Grade 3 students.'

try.math_note: 덧·뺄 혼합: ①총 머핀(245+178=423), ②판매 후(423−89=334). 2단계 문장제 기본 구조.

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 12
concept_source.description: Problem Solving: Model Addition and Subtraction — bar model 전략으로 2단계 문장제 풀기

procedure_source.name: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 2 Lesson 6
procedure_source.description: 2단계 덧셈·뺄셈 문장제: 막대 모델 그리기 → 식 세우기 → 검산

assessment_source.name: NCTM OA Progressions Grade 3 p.9
assessment_source.description: 3.OA.D.8 평가 지침 — 2단계 문장제 풀이 및 식 표현 능력 검증 기준

try.question: Lily collected 312 seashells. Her brother collected 145 fewer. How many do they have together?
try.hint: 'Fewer' means brother has LESS. Find his amount, then add both.

expected_errors.description: 남동생 조개 수(167)에서 멈춤 — 두 사람 합계(479)를 구하는 마지막 단계 누락
expected_errors.citation: Carpenter et al. (1999) p.13 — 'The most frequent error in two-step word problems is stopping at an intermediate result; this pattern affects 40–60% of Grade 3 students.'

try.math_note: 비교 뺄셈 후 합산: ①남동생 조개(312−145=167), ②합계(312+167=479). 'fewer'=뺄셈으로 기준량 찾기.

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 12
concept_source.description: Problem Solving: Model Addition and Subtraction — bar model 전략으로 2단계 문장제 풀기

procedure_source.name: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 2 Lesson 6
procedure_source.description: 2단계 덧셈·뺄셈 문장제: 막대 모델 그리기 → 식 세우기 → 검산

assessment_source.description: 3.OA.D.8 평가 지침 — 2단계 문장제 풀이 및 식 표현 능력 검증 기준

try.question: A bus has 72 passengers. 28 get off. Then 35 get on. How many are on the bus now?
try.hint: First subtract passengers who leave, then add new ones.

expected_errors.description: 내린 후 승객 수(44)에서 멈춤 — 이후 탑승(35명)을 더하는 단계 누락
expected_errors.citation: Carpenter et al. (1999) p.13 — 'The most frequent error in two-step word problems is stopping at an intermediate result; this pattern affects 40–60% of Grade 3 students.'

try.math_note: 덧·뺄 혼합: ①내린 후(72−28=44), ②탄 후(44+35=79). 순서대로 연산 적용.

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 12
concept_source.description: Problem Solving: Model Addition and Subtraction — bar model 전략으로 2단계 문장제 풀기

procedure_source.name: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 2 Lesson 6
procedure_source.description: 2단계 덧셈·뺄셈 문장제: 막대 모델 그리기 → 식 세우기 → 검산

assessment_source.name: NCTM OA Progressions Grade 3 p.9
assessment_source.description: 3.OA.D.8 평가 지침 — 2단계 문장제 풀이 및 식 표현 능력 검증 기준

try.question: Which operation do you do FIRST? 'Sam had 500 points. He lost 175 and gained 230.'
solution_steps: The events happen in order: lost first, then gained

expected_errors.description: A 선택 — 이야기 순서를 무시하고 얻기(+230)를 먼저 계산. 잃기(−175)를 먼저 적용해야 함

try.math_note: 연산 순서: 이야기 순서(잃음→얻음)로 먼저 뺀다(500−175). 막대 모델의 시간적 순서 = 연산 순서.

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 12
concept_source.description: Problem Solving: Model Addition and Subtraction — bar model 전략으로 2단계 문장제 풀기

procedure_source.name: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 2 Lesson 6
procedure_source.description: 2단계 덧셈·뺄셈 문장제: 막대 모델 그리기 → 식 세우기 → 검산

assessment_source.name: NCTM OA Progressions Grade 3 p.9
assessment_source.description: 3.OA.D.8 평가 지침 — 2단계 문장제 풀이 및 식 표현 능력 검증 기준

try.question: A farm has 328 chickens and 195 ducks. 147 chickens are sold. How many birds are on the farm now?
try.hint: Subtract sold chickens, then add remaining chickens + ducks.

expected_errors.description: 팔린 닭(147마리)을 제외하지 않고 원래 닭 수로 계산(328+195=523) — 남은 닭 수(181)를 먼저 구해야 함
expected_errors.citation: Carpenter et al. (1999) p.15 — 'Students undercount components when two or more groups are removed or added simultaneously.'

try.math_note: 덧·뺄 혼합: ①닭 남은 수(328−147=181), ②전체 새(181+195=376). 닭과 오리 수를 합산해야 함.

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 12
concept_source.description: Problem Solving: Model Addition and Subtraction — bar model 전략으로 2단계 문장제 풀기

procedure_source.name: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 2 Lesson 6

practice_r1.question: Pedro read 134 pages Monday and 98 pages Tuesday. He has 268 pages left. How many pages is the book?
practice_r1.hint: Total book = pages read + pages left.

expected_errors.description: 읽은 쪽수(232)에서 멈춤 — 남은 쪽수를 더해 총 쪽수(500)를 구하는 단계 누락
expected_errors.citation: Carpenter et al. (1999) p.13 — 'The most frequent error in two-step word problems is stopping at an intermediate result; this pattern affects 40–60% of Grade 3 students.'

practice_r1.question: A jar had 400 marbles. 156 red and 118 blue were removed. How many are left?
practice_r1.hint: Add removed marbles, then subtract from total.

expected_errors.description: 빨간 구슬만 제거(400−156=244) — 파란 구슬(118)도 제거해야 하는 성분 누락
expected_errors.citation: Carpenter et al. (1999) p.15 — 'Students undercount components when two or more groups are removed or added simultaneously.'

practice_r1.math_note: 2가지 물건 제거: ①빨강+파란(156+118=274), ②남은 구슬(400−274=126). 두 제거량을 합산 후 빼야 함.

practice_r1.question: Maya earned $275 in week 1 and $189 in week 2. She spent $200. How much does she have?

expected_errors.description: 총 수입(464)에서 멈춤 — 지출(200)을 빼는 마지막 단계 누락
expected_errors.citation: Carpenter et al. (1999) p.13 — 'The most frequent error in two-step word problems is stopping at an intermediate result; this pattern affects 40–60% of Grade 3 students.'

practice_r1.question: A train had 325 passengers. 198 got off. Then 147 got on. How many are on the train?

expected_errors.description: 하차 후 승객 수(127)에서 멈춤 — 이후 탑승자(147)를 더하는 단계 누락
expected_errors.citation: Carpenter et al. (1999) p.13 — 'The most frequent error in two-step word problems is stopping at an intermediate result; this pattern affects 40–60% of Grade 3 students.'

practice_r1.question: A garden has 260 flowers. 95 are red, 87 are yellow. The rest are white. How many white flowers?
practice_r1.hint: Add known flowers, subtract from total.

expected_errors.description: 빨간 꽃만 빼기(260−95=165) — 노란 꽃(87)도 포함해 제거해야 하는 성분 누락
expected_errors.citation: Carpenter et al. (1999) p.15 — 'Students undercount components when two or more groups are removed or added simultaneously.'

practice_r1.question: Ava collected 189 stickers. Ben collected 156 fewer than Ava. How many do they have in all?
practice_r1.hint: 'Fewer' means subtract to find Ben's amount.

expected_errors.description: 벤의 스티커(33)에서 멈춤 — 에이바와 벤 합계(222)를 구하는 단계 누락
expected_errors.citation: Carpenter et al. (1999) p.13 — 'The most frequent error in two-step word problems is stopping at an intermediate result; this pattern affects 40–60% of Grade 3 students.'

practice_r1.question: A school has 412 students. 189 walk to school. 134 take the bus. The rest are driven. How many are driven?
practice_r1.hint: Add walkers and bus riders, subtract from total.

expected_errors.description: 걸어오는 학생만 빼기(412−189=223) — 버스 학생(134)도 제외해야 하는 성분 누락
expected_errors.citation: Carpenter et al. (1999) p.15 — 'Students undercount components when two or more groups are removed or added simultaneously.'

practice_r1.question: Carlos had 350 baseball cards. He gave away 125, then bought 78 more. How many now?

expected_errors.description: 나눠준 후(225)에서 멈춤 — 새로 구매한 카드(78)를 더하는 단계 누락
expected_errors.citation: Carpenter et al. (1999) p.13 — 'The most frequent error in two-step word problems is stopping at an intermediate result; this pattern affects 40–60% of Grade 3 students.'

practice_r1.question: A bakery made 156 cookies in the morning and 237 in the afternoon. They put them equally into 3 display cases. How many total cookies?
solution_steps: The question asks for total cookies (not per case)
practice_r1.hint: Read carefully — it asks for TOTAL, not per case.

expected_errors.description: 3으로 나누려 함 — '3개 케이스에 동등 배분'이라는 불필요 정보에 현혹. 문제는 총 쿠키 수(393)만 묻고 있음

practice_r1.math_note: 합계만 묻는 문제: 총 쿠키(156+237=393). '3개 케이스에 동등 배분'은 추가 정보이며 답과 무관.

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 12
concept_source.description: Problem Solving: Model Addition and Subtraction — bar model 전략으로 2단계 문장제 풀기

procedure_source.name: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 2 Lesson 6
procedure_source.description: 2단계 덧셈·뺄셈 문장제: 막대 모델 그리기 → 식 세우기 → 검산

assessment_source.name: NCTM OA Progressions Grade 3 p.9
assessment_source.description: 3.OA.D.8 평가 지침 — 2단계 문장제 풀이 및 식 표현 능력 검증 기준

practice_r2.question: A zookeeper counted 345 birds, 278 reptiles, and 189 mammals. How many more birds than mammals?
practice_r2.hint: Watch out for extra information! Only compare birds and mammals.

expected_errors.description: 파충류(278) 포함 계산(345+278+189=812) — 문제는 새와 포유류만 비교. 파충류는 불필요 정보
expected_errors.citation: Van de Walle et al. (2013) p.167 — 'Students often incorporate all numbers present in a problem regardless of relevance.'

practice_r2.math_note: 불필요 정보 포함: 새−포유류만 필요(345−189=156). 파충류(278)는 무관한 정보.

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 12
concept_source.description: Problem Solving: Model Addition and Subtraction — bar model 전략으로 2단계 문장제 풀기

practice_r2.question: Jenna saved $218 in January and $175 in February. She spent $109 on a gift and $86 on books. How much is left?
practice_r2.hint: Add savings, add spending, then subtract.

expected_errors.description: 책 비용만 빼고 선물 비용 누락(393−86=307) 또는 선물만 빼기(393−109=284) — 두 지출 모두 빼야 함
expected_errors.citation: Carpenter et al. (1999) p.15 — 'Students undercount components when two or more groups are removed or added simultaneously.'

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 12
concept_source.description: Problem Solving: Model Addition and Subtraction — bar model 전략으로 2단계 문장제 풀기

assessment_source.name: NCTM OA Progressions Grade 3 p.9
assessment_source.description: 3.OA.D.8 평가 지침 — 2단계 문장제 풀이 및 식 표현 능력 검증 기준

practice_r2.question: Team A scored 246. Team B scored 189. Team C scored 73 more than Team B. Which team scored the most?
choices: D. Teams A and C tied
practice_r2.hint: Find Team C's score first, then compare all three.

expected_errors.description: C팀 점수를 계산하지 않고 주어진 수(A=246, B=189)만 비교 — C팀=189+73=262를 먼저 계산해야 함
expected_errors.citation: Carpenter et al. (1999) p.13 — 'The most frequent error in two-step word problems is stopping at an intermediate result; this pattern affects 40–60% of Grade 3 students.'

practice_r2.math_note: C팀 점수 계산 후 비교: ①C팀(189+73=262), ②비교(A=246, B=189, C=262) → C가 최고.

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 12
concept_source.description: Problem Solving: Model Addition and Subtraction — bar model 전략으로 2단계 문장제 풀기

assessment_source.description: 3.OA.D.8 평가 지침 — 2단계 문장제 풀이 및 식 표현 능력 검증 기준

practice_r2.question: A library had 750 books. Monday: returned 143, borrowed 267. Tuesday: returned 98, borrowed 156. How many books now?
practice_r2.hint: Returned = add, Borrowed = subtract. Do each day in order.

expected_errors.description: 월·화 반납을 모두 더한 후 대출을 모두 빼는 방식(750+143+98−267−156=568) — 결과는 같지만 연산 순서 이해 확인 필요

practice_r2.question: Rosa has 500 beads. She uses 185 for a necklace and 137 for a bracelet. She buys 100 more. How many now?
practice_r2.hint: Subtract used beads, then add new ones.

expected_errors.description: 목걸이 구슬만 사용(500−185=315) — 팔찌 구슬(137)도 함께 빼야 하는 성분 누락
expected_errors.citation: Carpenter et al. (1999) p.15 — 'Students undercount components when two or more groups are removed or added simultaneously.'

assessment_source.description: 3.OA.D.8 평가 지침 — 2단계 문장제 풀이 및 식 표현 능력 검증 기준

practice_r2.question: Jake's class collected 412 cans. Emma's class collected 389 cans. Together they gave 215 cans to charity. How many are left for recycling?
practice_r2.hint: Combine both classes, then subtract charity donation.

expected_errors.description: 합계(801)에서 멈춤 — 자선 기부(215)를 빼는 마지막 단계 누락
expected_errors.citation: Carpenter et al. (1999) p.13 — 'The most frequent error in two-step word problems is stopping at an intermediate result; this pattern affects 40–60% of Grade 3 students.'

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 12
concept_source.description: Problem Solving: Model Addition and Subtraction — bar model 전략으로 2단계 문장제 풀기

procedure_source.description: 2단계 덧셈·뺄셈 문장제: 막대 모델 그리기 → 식 세우기 → 검산

assessment_source.name: NCTM OA Progressions Grade 3 p.9
assessment_source.description: 3.OA.D.8 평가 지침 — 2단계 문장제 풀이 및 식 표현 능력 검증 기준

practice_r2.question: A theater sold 328 adult tickets and 256 child tickets. Adult tickets cost $8 each. How many tickets were sold in all?
practice_r2.hint: The question asks for NUMBER of tickets, not money.

expected_errors.description: 가격($8) 사용 — 328×8=2624. 문제는 총 티켓 수(584)만 묻고 있어 가격은 불필요 정보
expected_errors.citation: Van de Walle et al. (2013) p.167 — 'Students often incorporate all numbers present in a problem regardless of relevance.'

practice_r2.math_note: 불필요 정보: 총 티켓만 묻는 문제(328+256=584). 가격($8/장)은 답과 무관.

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 12
concept_source.description: Problem Solving: Model Addition and Subtraction — bar model 전략으로 2단계 문장제 풀기

procedure_source.name: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 2 Lesson 6
procedure_source.description: 2단계 덧셈·뺄셈 문장제: 막대 모델 그리기 → 식 세우기 → 검산

assessment_source.name: NCTM OA Progressions Grade 3 p.9
assessment_source.description: 3.OA.D.8 평가 지침 — 2단계 문장제 풀이 및 식 표현 능력 검증 기준

practice_r2.question: Ella had some stickers. She gave 128 to Amy and 96 to Bella. Now she has 276 left. How many did she start with?
practice_r2.hint: Work backwards: add what she gave away to what's left.

expected_errors.description: 276−128−96=52 계산 — 역방향 문제에서 덧셈 대신 뺄셈 사용. 시작 수=남은 수+나눠준 수

practice_r2.math_note: 역방향 문제: 준 양(128+96=224), 시작 스티커(276+224=500). 남은 양에서 거슬러 올라감.

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 12
concept_source.description: Problem Solving: Model Addition and Subtraction — bar model 전략으로 2단계 문장제 풀기

procedure_source.name: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 2 Lesson 6
procedure_source.description: 2단계 덧셈·뺄셈 문장제: 막대 모델 그리기 → 식 세우기 → 검산

assessment_source.name: NCTM OA Progressions Grade 3 p.9
assessment_source.description: 3.OA.D.8 평가 지침 — 2단계 문장제 풀이 및 식 표현 능력 검증 기준

practice_r2.question: Which bar model fits: 'Tom had 450 cards. He gave some to friends. Now he has 283. How many did he give away?'
solution_steps: Two parts: given away (?) and remaining (283)
practice_r2.hint: The total he started with splits into two parts.

expected_errors.description: B 선택(전체 ?, 부분 450/283) — 전체 450을 알고 부분 283을 알므로 전체가 위, 미지수가 부분인 A가 정답
expected_errors.citation: EngageNY G3 Module 2 Lesson 5 Teacher Edition — 'Students conflate the addition and subtraction bar model structures.'

practice_r2.math_note: 뺄셈 막대 모델: 전체(450)를 알고 부분 하나(283)를 알 때 → 전체 위, 부분 두 개 아래. 정답 A.

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 12
concept_source.description: Problem Solving: Model Addition and Subtraction — bar model 전략으로 2단계 문장제 풀기

procedure_source.name: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 2 Lesson 6
procedure_source.description: 2단계 덧셈·뺄셈 문장제: 막대 모델 그리기 → 식 세우기 → 검산

assessment_source.name: NCTM OA Progressions Grade 3 p.9
assessment_source.description: 3.OA.D.8 평가 지침 — 2단계 문장제 풀이 및 식 표현 능력 검증 기준

practice_r2.question: Pattie had 264 peppers. She sold some and had 112 left. Then she picked 89 more. How many does she have now?
solution_steps: Note: 264−?=112 is not needed to answer!
practice_r2.hint: She has 112 left, then picks 89 more. Simple addition!

expected_errors.description: 264를 사용(264−112=152, 152+89=241) — 현재 보유량(112)이 이미 주어져 있으므로 264는 불필요 정보
expected_errors.citation: Van de Walle et al. (2013) p.167 — 'Students often incorporate all numbers present in a problem regardless of relevance.'

practice_r2.math_note: 역방향+덧셈: 판매 후 이미 112개로 주어짐. ①더 딴 후(112+89=201). 264는 불필요 정보.

assessment_source.name: NCTM OA Progressions Grade 3 p.9
assessment_source.description: 3.OA.D.8 평가 지침 — 2단계 문장제 풀이 및 식 표현 능력 검증 기준

practice_r3.question: Draw a bar model: A school fair raised $347 from food, $285 from games, and $168 from crafts. They spent $436 on supplies. What was the profit? What is the first step?
solution_steps: First step is adding all earnings
practice_r3.hint: Find total earnings before subtracting expenses.

expected_errors.description: 436을 먼저 빼려 함 — 전체 수입 합계를 먼저 구해야 이익 계산이 가능. 순서 이해 필요

practice_r3.math_note: 3가지 수입의 합계가 먼저: 347+285+168=800. 이익을 구하려면 전체 수입부터 더해야 함.

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 12
concept_source.description: Problem Solving: Model Addition and Subtraction — bar model 전략으로 2단계 문장제 풀기

procedure_source.description: 2단계 덧셈·뺄셈 문장제: 막대 모델 그리기 → 식 세우기 → 검산

assessment_source.name: NCTM OA Progressions Grade 3 p.9
assessment_source.description: 3.OA.D.8 평가 지침 — 2단계 문장제 풀이 및 식 표현 능력 검증 기준

practice_r3.question: From the problem above, what is the school fair's profit?

expected_errors.description: 총 수입(800)에서 멈춤 — 이익=수입−지출(800−436=364)을 계산하는 마지막 단계 누락
expected_errors.citation: Carpenter et al. (1999) p.13 — 'The most frequent error in two-step word problems is stopping at an intermediate result; this pattern affects 40–60% of Grade 3 students.'

assessment_source.description: 3.OA.D.8 평가 지침 — 2단계 문장제 풀이 및 식 표현 능력 검증 기준

practice_r3.question: Sam had some coins. He found 46 more, then lost 29. Now he has 150. How many did he start with?
practice_r3.hint: Work backwards! Undo each step in reverse order.

expected_errors.description: 계산 실수: 역방향 풀이(150+29−46=133 또는 150+29=179, 179−46=133) 모두 정답이므로 산술 오류만 주의

assessment_source.description: 3.OA.D.8 평가 지침 — 2단계 문장제 풀이 및 식 표현 능력 검증 기준

practice_r3.question: Three classes collected cans: Room A got 215, Room B got 178, Room C got 207. The goal was 650 cans. Did they reach the goal? By how much over or under?
practice_r3.hint: Add all three rooms, then compare to 650.

expected_errors.description: 덧셈 오류: 215+178+207 계산 실수 → 610으로 잘못 계산. 올바른 합계=600, 50 부족

assessment_source.description: 3.OA.D.8 평가 지침 — 2단계 문장제 풀이 및 식 표현 능력 검증 기준

practice_r3.question: A toy store had 500 toys. Monday: sold 187. Tuesday: received 125, sold 93. Wednesday: received 200, sold 156. How many toys now?
practice_r3.hint: Process each day in order: add received, subtract sold.

expected_errors.description: 하나의 날(예: 월요일 결과 313)에서 멈춤 — 3일간의 변동을 모두 순서대로 적용해야 최종 389 도달
expected_errors.citation: Carpenter et al. (1999) p.13 — 'The most frequent error in two-step word problems is stopping at an intermediate result; this pattern affects 40–60% of Grade 3 students.'

lesson_summary: 막대 모델 문장제 마스터: ①문제 읽기 ②전체·부분 파악 ③막대 그리기 ④연산 결정 ⑤계산·검산. 2단계 문제는 1단계 결과를 중간값으로 사용해 2단계를 완성. 핵심 경계: '중간 결과에서 멈추지 않기' — 항상 질문에 직접 답했는지 재확인.
unit_intro_message: 이번 단원에서는 막대 모델(bar model)로 덧셈·뺄셈 문장제를 체계적으로 풀어봅니다. 막대 그림 한 장이 복잡한 2단계 문제도 쉽게 만들어줍니다. 준비됐나요? 🎯
unit_close_message: 막대 모델 전략을 완성했습니다! 이제 어떤 2단계 문장제도 ①전체·부분 파악 → ②막대 그리기 → ③연산 결정의 3단계로 해결할 수 있습니다. 항상 '내가 질문에 직접 답했나?'를 확인하는 습관을 유지하세요. 🏆
